2.text:
Consolidated Version No. 2   
In force on 12 November 2018

7.text: 3 PENALTY FOR OFFENCES AGAINST THE LAW

11.text: The Board of Directors of the DIFCA, in the exercise of the powers conferred on them by Article 145 of the Law, hereby make these Regulations.

12.text:
1. INTRODUCTION   
1.1. Application and interpretation   
1.1.1. These Regulations are the Strata Title Regulations.   
1.1.2. These Regulations apply to any person to whom the Law applies.   
1.1.3. A reference in these Regulations to a law is a reference to that law as amended from time to time.   
1.1.4. A reference in these Regulations to a Schedule is a reference to a Schedule in these Regulations, unless the contrary intention appears.

13.text: 1.1.5. In these Regulations unless the contrary intention appears:

15.text: 1.1.6. The Rules of Interpretation contained in Schedule 1 to the Law apply to the interpretation of these Regulations.

17.text: 2.1. The fees specified opposite the matters listed in Schedule 1 are payable to the Registrar in respect of those matters.

18.text: 2.2. A fee is payable before the provision of the service to which the fee relates, unless the Registrar agrees otherwise.

19.text: 2.3. The DIFCA may from time to time vary the fees in Schedule 1, and may add other fees for matters not listed in that Schedule as it considers necessary or appropriate and Schedule 1 shall be so amended without the requirement on the DIFCA to pass a further regulation to effect such variation or addition.

20.text: 3. PENALTY FOR OFFENCES AGAINST THE LAW

21.text: The penalty for an offence against the Law is one thousand dollars $( \mathrm { U S } \$ 1,000 )$ .

25.text:
ActivityFEES ($USD)
Lodgement of Strata Plan for Registration$500
Lodgement of amended Strata Plan for Registration$500
Lodgement of plan to consolidate Strata Schemes$500
Application to cancel Strata Scheme$500
Application to register Staged Strata Scheme$500
Application to register variation of Staged Strata Scheme$500
Application under Part 8 (Dispute Resolution) of Strata Title Law$100
